---
pagetitle: "Talks & Impact"
description: "Public talks, conference panels, guest lectures, and workshops by Anushka Saxena on Chinese military affairs and Indo-Pacific security."
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-hero">
  <div class="section-label">Speaking &amp; Outreach</div>
  <h1>Talks &amp; Impact</h1>
  <p>Conference panels, guest lectures, workshops, and closed-door briefings on China, the PLA, and Indo-Pacific security.</p>
</header>

<section class="as-section" style="padding-bottom:0;">
  <div class="as-container">
    <div class="stats-grid">
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-number">--</div><div class="stat-label">Talks Delivered</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-number">--</div><div class="stat-label">Institutions</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-number">--</div><div class="stat-label">Countries</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-number">--</div><div class="stat-label">Officers &amp; Students Briefed</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="as-section">
  <div class="as-container">
    <div class="section-label">Engagements</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Selected Talks &amp; Lectures</h2>
    <div class="gold-divider"></div>
```

{{< include _includes/talks.html >}}

```{=html}
  </div>
</section>

<section class="as-section as-section-alt">
  <div class="as-container">
    <div class="cta-band">
      <div>
        <h2>Invite Anushka to speak</h2>
        <p>Available for lectures, panels, wargames, and closed-door briefings on the PLA, China-Taiwan dynamics, and India's China policy.</p>
      </div>
      <a class="btn-gold" href="mailto:anushka@takshashila.org.in">Get in touch</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
